deploy.//: Production DB workflow is `prisma migrate deploy` — NEVER `prisma db push`. preDeployCommand runs migrations AND the idempotent reference-data seed once before the new release goes live. The seed is upsert-only (never deletes user data) and skips the admin account unless SEED_ADMIN_PASSWORD is set; without it a recreated database has an empty knowledge base and assessments return 0 steps.
deploy.preDeployCommand: npx prisma migrate deploy && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts
